attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks inside the final 1500m, targeting late-race positioning. Demonstrates sprint-from-breakaway capability rather than long-range moves.
team_tactics: Limited data on team setup, but rider appears positioned for finale opportunities rather than relying on heavy domestique support for sustained attacks.
terrain_preference: Stages with reduced bunch finishes where positioning and late acceleration matter more than pure sprint power. Thrives in scenarios allowing tactical late moves.
vulnerability: Lacks ultimate finishing acceleration to convert strong positioning into victories - three second-place finishes suggest consistent gap between podium placement and winning kick.
key_patterns: Attacks decisively inside final 1500m, establishing pattern of late-race aggression (2 observations)
Consistently reaches podium positions but struggles to close for victory (3 second places)
Strong tactical positioning throughout stage races, reliably in contention at finale
form_trajectory: neutral: Strong consistency with multiple podiums at 2023 Giro, but inability to convert positioning into wins suggests plateau at near-victory level
